title: Foundry Mold and Coremakers
description: Make or form wax or sand cores or molds used in the production of metal castings in foundries.

tasks.text: Clean and smooth molds, cores, and core boxes, and repair surface imperfections.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sift and pack sand into mold sections, core boxes, and pattern contours, using hand or pneumatic ramming tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position patterns inside mold sections, and clamp sections together.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position cores into lower sections of molds, and reassemble molds for pouring.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sprinkle or spray parting agents onto patterns and mold sections to facilitate removal of patterns from molds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Form and assemble slab cores around patterns, and position wire in mold sections to reinforce molds, using hand tools and glue.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move and position workpieces, such as mold sections, patterns, and bottom boards, using cranes, or signal others to move workpieces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lift upper mold sections from lower sections, and remove molded patterns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut spouts, runner holes, and sprue holes into molds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tend machines that bond cope and drag together to form completed shell molds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rotate sweep boards around spindles to make symmetrical molds for convex impressions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pour molten metal into molds, manually or with crane ladles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate ovens or furnaces to bake cores or to melt, skim, and flux metal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
